task_completion.description: The 'State' column (H) in the 'Strikes' sheet is populated with state values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Strikes' sheet, column H has the header 'State' and contains state names/abbreviations corresponding to the Airport_Code.

task_completion.description: The 'Total_Cost' column (I) in the 'Strikes' sheet is populated with the sum of costs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Strikes' sheet, column I has the header 'Total_Cost' and contains numerical values representing the sum of Repair_Cost and Other_Cost.

task_completion.description: The 'Major_Incident' column (J) in the 'Strikes' sheet is populated with 'Yes' or 'No'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Strikes' sheet, column J has the header 'Major_Incident' and contains 'Yes' or 'No' values.

task_completion.description: The 'Summary' sheet contains calculated values for 'Total_Strikes', 'Total_Cost', and 'Major_Incidents' for each State.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Summary' sheet is visible with columns for State, Total_Strikes, Total_Cost, and Major_Incidents filled with aggregated numerical data for each state.

task_completion.description: Currency formatting is applied to the Total_Cost columns in both sheets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values in the 'Total_Cost' column of the 'Strikes' sheet and the 'Total_Cost' column of the 'Summary' sheet display currency symbols (e.g., $).

task_completion.description: The workbook is saved after making all changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save action is visible (e.g., clicking the save icon, using Ctrl+S, or no unsaved changes indicator in the spreadsheet application title bar).

integrity.description: The agent used a spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file opened and edited in a graphical spreadsheet application, not via terminal commands or a Python script.

integrity.description: The agent used formulas to calculate values rather than manually typing them.
integrity.visual_evidence: When cells in the calculated columns (State, Total_Cost, Major_Incident, or Summary sheet columns) are selected, the formula bar shows appropriate formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, SUM, IF, SUMIFS, COUNTIFS) instead of hardcoded values.

integrity.description: The agent did not write a script to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing Python scripts or pandas being used to manipulate the xlsx file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 60 rows of strike data (generated by duplicating 20 real FAA records three times). The file is located at /home/ga/Documents/wildlife_strikes.xlsx and contains three sheets: 'Strikes', 'Airports', and 'Summary'.
